nasb.text: He will judge among the nations, He will fill them with corpses, He will shatter the chief men over a broad country.

esv.text: He will execute judgment among the nations, filling them with corpses; he will shatter chiefs over the wide earth.

cnv.text: 他必在列國中施行審判， 屍首就遍滿各處； 他要剿滅地上各處的首領。

ccb.text: 祂要审判列国， 使列国尸横遍野。 祂要毁灭世上的首领。

csbs.text: 他将在列国中施行审判，使列国尸横遍野； 他将击碎全地的头领。
